metadata.description: Wiring diagram for servo motor with position feedback

metadata.content:
# Servo Motor Control with Position Feedback

## Overview
This template implements an advanced servo motor control system with position feedback and web interface. It supports precise servo positioning with real-time feedback monitoring.

## Features
- Precise servo motor control
- Position feedback via potentiometer
- Configurable angle range and movement speed
- Web-based control interface (ESP32)
- Preset position buttons
- Real-time position monitoring
- Movement status tracking
- Position error calculation
- JSON API for integration

## Control Methods
### Web Interface (ESP32)
- **Angle Slider**: Direct position control
- **Speed Control**: Adjustable movement speed (1-10)
- **Preset Buttons**: Quick access to predefined positions
- **Status Display**: Real-time position and feedback

### Serial Commands
Send angle commands via serial:
```
ANGLE:90    # Move to 90 degrees
SPEED:5     # Set movement speed
STATUS      # Get current status
```

## Position Feedback
- **Potentiometer**: 10k linear potentiometer for position sensing
- **Error Calculation**: Compares target vs actual position
- **Calibration**: Maps potentiometer values to angle range
- **Accuracy**: Typically ±2-3 degrees with proper calibration

## Configuration Options
- **Servo Pin**: PWM pin for servo control (default: 9)
- **Feedback Pin**: Analog pin for potentiometer (default: A0)
- **Angle Range**: Min/max angle limits (default: 0-180°)
- **Movement Speed**: Speed control (1=slowest, 10=fastest)
- **Feedback**: Enable/disable position feedback
- **Presets**: Customizable preset positions

## Calibration
1. **Mechanical Calibration**: Ensure servo moves through full range
2. **Feedback Calibration**: Map potentiometer readings to actual angles
3. **Range Setting**: Adjust MIN_ANGLE and MAX_ANGLE for your application
4. **Speed Tuning**: Set appropriate speed for your use case

## Wiring
- Servo VCC → Arduino 5V
- Servo GND → Arduino GND
- Servo Signal → Arduino Digital Pin {{.servoPin}}
- Potentiometer VCC → Arduino 5V
- Potentiometer GND → Arduino GND
- Potentiometer Wiper → Arduino Analog Pin {{.feedbackPin}}

## API Endpoints (ESP32)
- `GET /` - Main web interface
- `POST /control` - Control servo angle and speed
- `GET /status` - Get current status
- `GET /presets` - Get preset positions

## Control API
Send POST request to `/control`:
```
angle=90&speed=5
```

## Response Format
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "targetAngle": 90,
  "currentAngle": 90,
  "isMoving": false,
  "feedbackAngle": 88,
  "positionError": 2,
  "speed": 5
}
```

## Preset Positions
Default presets:
- **Home**: 90° (center position)
- **Left**: 0° (minimum angle)
- **Right**: 180° (maximum angle)
- **Center**: 90° (center position)

## Movement Characteristics
- **Speed Control**: Adjustable from 1-10 (slowest to fastest)
- **Smooth Motion**: Gradual movement prevents jerking
- **Position Feedback**: Real-time position monitoring
- **Error Detection**: Identifies positioning errors

## Use Cases
- **Camera Pan/Tilt**: Precise camera positioning
- **Robotics**: Joint control for robotic arms
- **Automation**: Valve and damper control
- **Model Making**: Scale model control
- **Gate Control**: Automated gate positioning
- **Solar Tracking**: Solar panel positioning
- **Display Control**: Screen angle adjustment

## Integration Options
- **Sensor Integration**: Auto-position based on sensors
- **Automation Rules**: Time-based or event-driven positioning
- **Remote Control**: Integration with control systems
- **Data Logging**: Position history and analytics
- **Safety Systems**: Position limits and emergency stops

## Dependencies
- Servo library (built-in)
- ArduinoJson v6.21.3
- WiFi library (ESP32 built-in)
- WebServer library (ESP32 built-in)

## Troubleshooting
- **Servo Not Moving**: Check power supply and connections
- **Feedback Inaccurate**: Calibrate potentiometer mapping
- **Web Interface Not Loading**: Check WiFi connection (ESP32)
- **Position Error**: Verify mechanical alignment
- **Jerky Movement**: Adjust speed settings

## Advanced Features
- **Multi-Servo**: Control multiple servos simultaneously
- **Trajectory Planning**: Smooth path planning
- **Closed-Loop Control**: Automatic position correction
- **Load Compensation**: Adjust for load variations
- **Safety Limits**: Software position limits

## Performance Specifications
- **Position Accuracy**: ±2-3 degrees with feedback
- **Update Rate**: 20Hz position updates
- **Response Time**: 100-500ms depending on speed
- **Feedback Resolution**: 10-bit ADC (1024 levels)
- **Angle Resolution**: 0.176 degrees (180°/1024)

## Safety Considerations
- **Load Limits**: Don't exceed servo torque ratings
- **Power Supply**: Use adequate power supply for servo
- **Mechanical Stops**: Prevent over-travel
- **Emergency Stop**: Implement software and hardware stops
- **Regular Inspection**: Check for wear and tear
